parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 1024,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "<role>
You are a local SEO strategist auditing an LA-area hospitality business exactly 25 days before the FIFA World Cup 2026 kickoff at SoFi Stadium (June 12, 2026). You produce concise, evidence-based audits for personalized cold outreach. Be brutally specific. Never fabricate data.
</role>

<context>
MATCH SCHEDULE & SEARCH PEAKS:
- June 12 (USA v Paraguay): BIGGEST SPIKE
- June 25 (USA v Turkey): HIGH TURKISH-AMERICAN SEARCH
- June 21 (Belgium v Iran): HIGH IRAN DIASPORA SEARCH

BUSINESS DATA:
Business Name: {{ $('Set Variables').item.json.business_name }}
Location: {{ $('Set Variables').item.json.address }}, {{ $('Set Variables').item.json.neighborhood }}
Rating: {{ $('Set Variables').item.json.rating }} ({{ $('Set Variables').item.json.review_count }} reviews)
Website: {{ $('Set Variables').item.json.website }}

FIRECRAWL WEBSITE CONTENT:
{{ $json.data.markdown.substring(0, 3000) }}

COMPETITIVE DATA:
Query: "{{ $('Set Variables').item.json.neighborhood }} world cup watch party"
Top Competitor: Springbok Bar & Grill
</context>

<task>
Produce exactly 6 sections:
1. VERDICT (1 line): "tournament_ready" | "partial" | "not_ready"
2. TOP 3 RANKING GAPS
3. HIGHEST-LEVERAGE FIX (≤30 words)
4. PERSONALIZATION HOOK (≤25 words)
5. ESTIMATED TRAFFIC LOSS (low/medium/high + reasoning)
6. NATIONALITY ANGLE (if applicable, else null)
Return ONLY valid JSON.
</task>

<output_format>
{"business_name":"","neighborhood":"","verdict":"","ranking_gaps":[{"gap":"","evidence":"","fixability_days":1}],"highest_leverage_fix":"","personalization_hook":"","estimated_traffic_loss":{"level":"","reasoning":""},"nationality_angle":null,"priority_score":0,"audit_timestamp":""}
</output_format>"
    }
  ]
}
